title: Interactive Loading Spinner

statement.markdown:
## Interactive Loading Spinner

Create a loading spinner element spinning dynamically.

### Requirements:
1. **Circular Borders**: Create ring structures with custom dash offsets and border highlights.
2. **Infinite Rotation**: Spin loaders infinitely using CSS transforms keyframes.
3. **Toggle states**: Clicking action buttons triggers load active displays toggling.

constraints: Must implement linear transform rotations keyframes
Toggle actions should update active styles smoothly

starterCode.css: /* Add spinner infinite keyframes rotating animations here */

gradingCriteria.description: Verify loaders spin infinitely in linear cycles.
Verify button clicks toggle loading states dynamically.
